latestRun.summary: MODE: email_automation_guardrail. HARD STOP: First read /home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/memory/email-actions-paused.json. If file missing OR paused != false, do NOTHING and reply exactly NO_REPLY. If and only if paused==false, run periodic email guardrail check using mailbox/account cheese@luggle.com only (never infer mailbox from message metadata). Use policy file /home/ubuntu/.openclaw/workspace/config/email_guardrail_policy.json as source of truth. Maintain durable state in memory/email-state.json with per-message/thread seen/acted/replied timestamps. Decisioning uses durable state, not unread. Lyra invariant enforced (always allowlisted + reply required). Do NOT send Slack status messages for routine checks; only surface actionable failures requiring intervention.
